caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Rough Seas Impact Turks and Caicos Today
caribbean.paragraph: Turks and Caicos is experiencing strong tropical moisture with sustained winds reaching 18 knots and significant wave heights up to 7.0 feet from a dominant NNE swell direction. Rain probability is high at 90 percent, creating hazardous marine conditions near the port, while San Juan sees lighter winds near 11 knots with less impact.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain Hits Marseille with Moderate Winds and Waves
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing heavy rainfall with a 93% chance of precipitation today, accompanied by moderate southeast winds reaching 16 knots and wave heights up to 2.3 feet. Conditions remain stable in Haifa with winds slightly higher at 17 knots but minimal wave activity.
